---
title: ""
---

<div class="bio-shell">

<div class="bio-card">

<img class="avatar" src="toledo.jpg" alt="Avatar" />

<h1 class="name">Jose Toledo Luna</h1>
<div class="role">Statistics Ph.D. Candidate @ UCLA</div>

<p class="blurb">
Statistics Ph.D. student at University of California, Los Angeles advised by
[Hongquan Xu](https://statistics.ucla.edu/index.php/people1/all-faculty/7809-2/?smid=8823).
</p>

<div class="links">

<a class="link-btn" href="research.qmd">
  <span class="left">
    <i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i>
    <span class="label">Research</span>
  </span>
</a>

<a class="link-btn" href="teaching.qmd">
  <span class="left">
    <i class="bi bi-person-workspace"></i>
    <span class="label">Teaching</span>
  </span>
</a>


<a class="link-btn" href="docs/CV/CV.pdf">
  <span class="left">
    <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i>
    <span class="label">Curriculum Vitae (CV)</span>
  </span>
</a>


<a class="link-btn" href="https://github.com/toledo60" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
  <span class="left">
    <i class="bi bi-github"></i>
    <span class="label">GitHub</span>
  </span>
  <span class="hint">@toledo60</span>
</a>


<a class="link-btn" href="mailto:toledo60@g.ucla.edu" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
  <span class="left">
    <i class="bi bi-envelope"></i>
    <span class="label">Email</span>
  </span>
  <span class="hint">toledo60@g.ucla.edu</span>
</a>

</div>
